title: MDYD-911 Wife's sexy underwear - something she never shows to her husband - Yuri Shirai
overview: Yuri is a pure wife to me, an unpopular guy. I made sure she was not exposed to the gazes of vulgar men by limiting her outings and only allowing her to wear plain underwear. But one day, I discovered some flashy underwear in Yuri's dresser!!! I became a stalker and followed her, and Yuri transformed into a lewd and vulgar bitch in the flashy underwear...
